workshoptitle: Build Media Launch Intelligence with Oracle Database 26ai

tutorials.title: Introduction
tutorials.description: The Seer Media Midnight Harbor operating story and workshop goals.

tutorials.title: Getting Started
tutorials.description: Open Database Actions SQL Worksheet and confirm the workshop schema context.

tutorials.title: Lab 1: Media Data Foundation
tutorials.description: Inspect the governed media schema foundation and map scenes to database capabilities.

tutorials.title: Lab 2: Launch Operations Command Center
tutorials.description: Query launch KPIs, content revenue, and demand-alert evidence from Oracle Database.

tutorials.title: Lab 3: Campaign and Rights Requests with JSON Relational Duality
tutorials.description: Use JSON Relational Duality, SQL/JSON, and relational SQL over one campaign request truth source.

tutorials.title: Lab 4: Audience Momentum and Safety Signals with AI Vector Search
tutorials.description: Verify the embedding model and inspect governed semantic matching across content assets and audience signals.

tutorials.title: Lab 5: Creator and Community Graph with Property Graph
tutorials.description: Use Property Graph and SQL/PGQ to analyze creator reach and connected influence paths.

tutorials.title: Lab 6: Rights, Capacity, and Live Event Coverage with Oracle Spatial
tutorials.description: Use Oracle Spatial, demand regions, and distribution hubs for rights and coverage decisions.

tutorials.title: Lab 7: Engagement, Revenue, and Retention Forecasts with Oracle Machine Learning
tutorials.description: Inspect OML models, forecast views, and capacity-risk evidence from the Media stack.

tutorials.title: Lab 8: Ask Seer Media Data: Trusted Answers
tutorials.description: Show how approved views, metadata, and visible SQL support trusted media answers.

tutorials.title: Lab 9: Seer Media Agent Console: Trusted Actions
tutorials.description: Call approved tools, inspect grounded evidence, and verify the audit trail.

tutorials.title: Lab 10: Use Your Own Media Data
tutorials.description: Inspect the dataset-state and import workflow behind the bring-your-own-data path.

tutorials.title: Conclusion
tutorials.description: Connect audience signals, rights capacity, forecasts, trusted answers, and agent actions into one media decision loop.

tutorials.title: Final Quiz
tutorials.description: Check your understanding with scored outcome-focused questions.

tutorials.title: Need Help?
tutorials.description: Solutions to common problems and directions for receiving Live Help.
